context: Checkpoint 2026-05-01T03:08Z after continuing best lane for Refarm host potential: created a shared Homestead host-renderer contract and made apps/dev advertise the Studio Web renderer through it. current_tasks: Latest commits: b61b5f64 `refactor(app-dev): advertise studio web renderer`; 5cc860cd `feat(homestead): define host renderer contract`; 4cec8a53 `chore(project): checkpoint refarm host model`; 961167bc `docs(architecture): define refarm host model`.

5cc860cd added `packages/homestead/src/sdk/host-renderer.ts` with renderer kinds (`web`, `tui`, `headless`), renderer capabilities, default capability sets, descriptor/snapshot/state interfaces, and helpers: `createHomesteadHostRendererDescriptor`, `homesteadHostRendererCan`, `missingHomesteadHostRendererCapabilities`, `normalizeHomesteadHostRendererCapabilities`, `isHomesteadHostRendererKind`.

Homestead now exports the host-renderer contract from `@refarm.dev/homestead/sdk` and subpath `@refarm.dev/homestead/sdk/host-renderer`; `packages/homestead/package.json` has the export. `packages/homestead/README.md` and `docs/REFARM_HOST_MODEL.md` document this as the first shared renderer vocabulary slice.

`apps/dev/tsconfig.json` and `apps/me/tsconfig.json` include path mappings for `@refarm.dev/homestead/sdk/host-renderer` to avoid source-mode import failures like earlier locale/custom-element issues.

b61b5f64 made `apps/dev/src/lib/studio-dashboard-runtime.ts` consume the new contract: it exports `STUDIO_DASHBOARD_RENDERER = createHomesteadHostRendererDescriptor('refarm-dev-web','web', ...)` and includes `renderer` in the returned `StudioDashboardWorkbench`. The test asserts the renderer descriptor.

Validations passed: `npm --prefix packages/homestead test -- host-renderer.test.ts`; `npm --prefix packages/homestead run type-check`; `npm --prefix packages/homestead run build`; `npm --prefix apps/dev test -- studio-dashboard-runtime.test.ts`; `npm --prefix apps/dev run type-check`; `npm --prefix apps/me run type-check`; `npm run project:validate --silent`; `git diff --check`.
